overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a motorcycle crash in a coastal highway traffic jam, followed by the player character exploring the accident scene on foot and then driving along a scenic mountain highway overlooking the ocean.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway traffic jam with vehicle accident

events.description: motorcycle crashes into the side of a semi-truck and slides underneath it
rider is thrown from motorcycle and falls to the pavement

agents.ego_description: riding a motorcycle through stopped traffic before crashing into a semi-truck and falling to the ground

notable_agents.action: black semi-truck with trailer blocking the lane, motorcycle crashed beneath its trailer

entered.detail: white police sedan with Los Santos County markings and blue emergency lights
white sedan with open doors and front-end damage
classic gray muscle car with black racing stripes
white commercial box truck with red logo on the side
large black semi-truck with trailer emitting smoke
tall rocky mountain with snow patches visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a sunny coastal highway traffic jam with a Los Santos County police car and multiple damaged vehicles. A motorcycle crashes violently into a semi-truck, sending the rider to the ground amid the stopped traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway accident scene with scattered debris

events.description: character gets up from the ground and begins walking through the traffic jam
passing a body lying on the ground next to a black sedan

agents.ego_description: walking through the accident scene past damaged vehicles and debris, examining the aftermath

notable_agents.action: body lying prone on the asphalt next to a black sedan, apparently a casualty of the accident

entered.detail: white utility truck with green lettering on the door
old brown and white pickup truck with visible rust
black four-door sedan with driver visible inside
metal guardrail running along the edge of the highway overlooking the ocean
blue ocean water visible beyond the guardrail

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the congested accident scene, passing the crashed motorcycle and moving between stationary vehicles. The coastal guardrail comes into view on the left revealing the ocean and beach below, while a body lies on the ground near a black sedan.

events.description: character enters a vehicle and begins driving along the highway
overtaking slower traffic on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: driving at highway speed along the coastal road, overtaking other vehicles while hugging the left lane near the guardrail

entered.detail: gold and brown SUV driving in the right lane
white pickup truck with black trim being overtaken

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to driving at speed along the scenic coastal highway. The camera overtakes several vehicles while the ocean remains visible to the left and the mountain slope rises on the right. The road curves gently as the journey continues along the picturesque coastline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a chaotic traffic accident on a coastal highway to a high-speed journey along a scenic mountain road. It begins amidst a sunny traffic jam where a motorcycle crashes violently into a semi-truck, leaving the rider on the ground surrounded by damaged vehicles and a police car. As the perspective shifts to a walking pace, the camera weaves through the stationary wreckage and past a body near a black sedan, gradually revealing the ocean and beach beyond the left guardrail. The scene then transitions into a rapid drive at speed, overtaking other vehicles as the road curves gently. Finally, the view expands to show the vast ocean on the left and a rising mountain slope on the right while accelerating along the picturesque coastline.
